accessTokenPlaceholder: Find this in the CLI output
initSubtitle: Configure your AI agent environment in three simple steps.
oauthUserCodeHint: Enter the authorization code below in your browser:
oauthCompleteHint: After authorization in browser, click confirm below:
oauthManualHint: If callback failed, manually paste code below:
apiKeyHint: Leave empty to use system environment variables. Use the docs link on the right if needed.

apiFormatHint.openai: Use this for providers exposing `/models` plus Chat Completions-style APIs.
apiFormatHint.responses: Use this for OpenAI Responses-style services; model discovery still reads `/models`.
apiFormatHint.anthropic: Use this for native Anthropic Claude APIs; model discovery sends `x-api-key` and `anthropic-version`.
apiFormatHint.google: Use this for native Google Gemini APIs; model discovery calls the `models` list with `?key=`.

saveSuccessSubtitle: Your Neoclaw agent configuration has been updated. The backend watcher will hot-reload your new settings automatically!
whatsNextHint: To start interacting with your AI agent, go back to your terminal and exit this Configuration Wizard (Ctrl+C), then run the following command:
bunHintPrefix: If you are using Bun from source, run:
clickStartHint: Your configuration is saved. Click the button below to start the agent; Neoclaw will detect whether to use neoclaw or bun run start.
autoStartSuccessHint: Switching into the main agent flow now. This page will disconnect shortly, and the terminal will continue with agent logs.
autoStartAlreadyHint: The agent is already running, so you do not need to start it again.
autoStartFailedHint: Start failed. Review the error, then retry or run the command above manually.
autoStartSuccessSubtitle: After the switch, run neoclaw web again any time you want to reopen the configuration UI.
startCommandHint: If the button fails, you can still run the command above manually.
testConnectionHint: You can run a quick prompt to verify if your configured model is responding securely before switching to the main CLI/Bot.
noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Send a prompt to test.
failedLoadContext: Failed to load application context. Is the server running?
configManagementSubtitle: Export the current config, import from a file, and safely roll back after previewing snapshots.
configManagementLoadFailed: Failed to load configuration management data
configImportPreviewSubtitle: Review the fields that will change before applying this import.
configImportSnapshotHint: An automatic pre-import snapshot was created at
configRollbackPreviewSubtitle: Review the configuration that will be restored before rolling back.
configRollbackSnapshotHint: An automatic pre-rollback backup was created at
configActionsSubtitle: Download the current config or import an existing JSON config from disk.
configHistorySubtitle: Review saved snapshots and preview before rolling back.
